positive: A whimsical forest animal portrait featuring a majestic owl perched on a stylized branch, surrounded by bioluminescent mushrooms and ethereal vines. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau and detailed botanical illustration, utilizing strong, clean silhouettes and intricate line work. Composition must be centrally focused, ideal for t-shirts. Color palette: deep forest greens, sapphire blues, and accents of glowing cyan/gold. High contrast with subtle gradients. Perfect for commercial apparel printing. Cinematic, detailed, vector art, 8k.
negative: blurry, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, artifacts, smudges
